description: Merge-throughput baselines for parallel HTAP merge worker benchmarks (v0.53.0).

conditions.notes: Baseline measurements from CI benchmark gate. p50/p95 computed from 5 independent runs.

citus_bulk_load.description: Citus direct-shard bulk-load path vs coordinator routing (v0.61.0 CITUS-21).

coordinator_routing.notes: Coordinator-routed inserts on a 4-worker Citus cluster; baseline before CITUS-21.

conditions.hardware: 4-worker Citus cluster, 8-core workers with NVMe SSD
conditions.notes: Measured on synthetic dataset; real-world improvement depends on network latency.
